title: Pul Biber Sous-Vide Tabbouleh
description: A mediterranean-inspired dish featuring pul biber (fermented walnuts) infused with the richness of sous-vide cooking for a unique and flavorful twist on traditional tabbouleh.

ingredients.name: 150g (about 6 oz) pul biber (fermented walnuts)
ingredients.notes: ensure the texture is smooth and finely chopped

instructions: Rinse the bulgur under cold water until it stops releasing cloudy liquid. Drain well.
Mix the washed bulgur with cumin and pepper in a large bowl. Add minced garlic.
Add diced tomatoes and chopped fresh herbs (parsley, mint).
In another medium-sized bowl, mix olive oil into finely chopped pul biber until smooth.
Fold the pul biber mixture into the tabbouleh ingredients gently but thoroughly to distribute evenly.
Serve chilled as a salad. Optionally, you can add a drizzle of olive oil and squeeze some fresh lemon juice over top for extra freshness.
